caption: In a room featuring a clothing rack and framed photographs, two men are engaged in a conversation. One man wears a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" text, and gold jewelry, holding a small booklet. He sits behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. Across from him, a man wearing a green baseball cap and a green t-shirt that reads "ION NEVER DO SHIRT RK" smiles while looking at his phone. The background includes a white banner with the text "Where BOSSES Talk!" and a repetitive logo featuring three stars and the words "URBAN HUSTLE." Small logos for "BOSS TALK" are visible in the bottom corners of the scene. While the first shot focuses on the man in the black hoodie, the subsequent shots shift focus to the man in the green shirt, who remains smiling and glancing at his mobile device.
